name: Ablative Barrier
components: V, S, M (a piece of metal cut from a shield)
description: Surrounds the target with layers of force.

name: Aboleth's Lung
description: The targets are able to breathe water, freely.

name: Absorb Toxicity
components: V, S, M (a thorn from a poisonous plant)
description: You become immune to diseases and toxins, absorb one, and then spread it to others.

name: Absorbing Inhalation
target: one cloud-like effect, up to one 10-ft. cube/level
description: You grant your lungs inhuman strength and capacity, allowing you to harmlessly and completely inhale one gas, fog, smoke, mist, or similar cloud-like effect.

name: Absorbing Touch
description: Caster absorbs an item for 1 day/level.

name: Abundant Ammunition
components: V, S, M/DF (a single piece of ammunition)
description: Replaces nonmagical ammunition every round.

name: Accelerate Poison
description: Hastens targeted poison's onset.

name: Acid Arrow
components: V, S, M (rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach), F (a dart)
description: Ranged touch attack; 2d4 damage for 1 round + 1 round/3 levels.

name: Acid Fog
components: V, S, M (powdered peas and an animal hoof)
effect: fog spreads in 20-ft. radius, 20 ft. high
description: Fog deals acid damage.

name: Acid Pit
components: V, S, M (drop of acid), F (Fine shovel worth 10 gp)
description: Creates a pit with a layer of acid on the bottom.

name: Acid Splash
description: Orb deals 1d3 acid damage.

name: Acidic Spray
components: V, S, M (a vial of acid worth 10 gp)
description: 1d6/level acid damage plus 1 round of acid.

name: Acute Senses
description: Subject gains a bonus on Perception checks.

name: Adhesive Blood
description: Attackers' weapons stick to your blood.

name: Adhesive Spittle
description: Spit a tanglefoot bag at a creature.

name: Adjuring Step
description: You can move slowly and safely and still cast spells, until you move quickly, make an attack, or cast a harmful spell.

name: Adjustable Disguise
description: As disguise self, but you can change the disguise as a swift action.

name: Adjustable Polymorph
components: V, S, M (a small piece of doppelganger flesh)
description: As alter self, but you can change the shape as a swift action.

name: Adoration
description: You gain a bonus on Diplomacy checks and performance combat checks.

name: Age Resistance
description: Ignore penalties from old age.

name: Age Resistance, Greater
description: Ignore penalties from venerable age.

name: Age Resistance, Lesser
description: Ignore penalties from middle age.

name: Aggressive Thundercloud
components: V, S, M/DF (a piece of a tree struck by lightning)
description: Flying storm cloud deals 3d6 electricity damage.

name: Aggressive Thundercloud, Greater
components: V, S, M/DF (a piece of a tree struck by lightning)
saving_throw: Reflex negates and Fortitude negates (see text)
description: Flying storm cloud deals 6d6 electricity damage.

name: Agonize
target: one conjured outsider or elemental (see text)
description: Pain encourages an outsider to obey you.

name: Agonizing Rebuke
description: With a word and a gesture, you instill such apprehension about attacking you in your target that doing so causes it mental distress and pain.

name: Aid
description: +1 on attack rolls and saves against fear, 1d8 temporary hp +1/level (max +10).

name: Air Breathing
components: V, S, M/DF (flower or piece of grass)
description: The transmuted creatures can breathe air freely. Divide the duration evenly among all the creatures you touch. The spell doesn't make creatures unable to breathe water.

name: Air Bubble
components: S, M/DF (a small bladder filled with air)
target: one creature or one object no larger than a Large two-handed weapon
description: Creates a small pocket of air around your head or an object.

name: Air Geyser
target: one creature or object up to Large size
description: Blast of air deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage and knocks opponent upward.

name: Air Step
description: Tread unsteadily on air, with limitations.

name: Air Walk
description: Subject treads on air as if solid (climb or descend at 45-degree angle).

name: Air Walk, Communal
description: As air walk, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

name: Alarm
components: V, S, F/DF (a tiny bell and a piece of very fine silver wire)
area: 20-ft.-radius emanation centered on a point in space
description: Wards an area for 2 hours/level.

name: Alchemical Allocation
description: Gain potion's benefits without consuming it.

name: Alchemical Tinkering
description: You transform one alchemical item or firearm into another alchemical item or firearm of the same or lesser cost.

name: Align Weapon
target: weapon touched or 50 projectiles (all of which must be together at the time of casting)
description: Weapon becomes good, evil, lawful, or chaotic.

name: Align Weapon, Communal
description: As align weapon, but you can divide the duration among weapons touched.

name: Allegro
description: Gain haste while maintaining bardic performance.

name: Allfood
components: V, S, M (a pinch of salt and pepper)
target: object touched, weighing up to 5 lbs./level
description: Turns item up to 5 lbs./level into food.

name: Alter Musical Instrument
description: Make one instrument sound like a different kind of instrument.

name: Alter Self
components: V, S, M (a piece of the creature whose form you plan to assume)
description: Assume form of a Small or Medium humanoid.

name: Alter Winds
description: Increase/decrease strength of natural winds.

name: Amplify Elixir
description: Empowers or extends the effects of any potion or elixir.

name: Amplify Stench
description: You amplify your natural stench special ability—its save DC increases by 2, and creatures that fail their saving throws against your stench become nauseated rather than sickened. If your stench ability normally causes a creature to become nauseated (such as with the foul stench ability), the radius of your stench doubles instead. This spell has no effect if you don't possess the stench special ability.

name: Analyze Dweomer
components: V, S, F (a ruby and gold lens worth 1,500 gp)
target: one object or creature per caster level
saving_throw: none or Will negates, see text
description: Reveals magical aspects of subject.

name: Ancestral Regression
description: The target drow transforms into a surface elf.

name: Anchored Step
components: V, S, M (a bit of oak root)
description: Vines beneath your feet stabilize you but slow you down.

name: Animal Aspect
components: V, S, M/DF (a part of the animal)
description: You gain some of the beneficial qualities of an animal.

name: Animal Aspect, Greater
components: V, S, M/DF (a part of the animal)
description: As animal aspect, but you gain two animal qualities.

name: Animal Growth
description: One animal doubles in size.

name: Animal Messenger
components: V, S, M (a morsel of food the animal likes)
description: Sends a Tiny animal to a specific place.

name: Animal Purpose Training
components: V, S, M (a swatch of black cloth)
description: Animal gains a new general purpose.

name: Animal Shapes
target: up to one willing creature per level, all within 30 ft. of each other.
description: One ally/level polymorphs into chosen animal.

name: Animal Trance
target: animals or magical beasts with Intelligence 1 or 2
description: Fascinates 2d6 HD of animals.

name: Animate Dead
components: V, S, M (an onyx gem worth at least 25 gp per Hit Die of the undead)
description: Creates undead skeletons and zombies.

name: Animate Dead, Lesser
components: V, S, M (an onyx gem worth at least 25 gp per Hit Die of the undead)
description: Create one skeleton or zombie.

name: Animate Objects
target: one Small object per caster level; see text
description: Objects attack your foes.

name: Animate Plants
target: one Large plant per three caster levels or all plants within range; see text
description: One or more plants animate and fight for you.

name: Animate Rope
target: one rope-like object, length up to 50 ft. + 5 ft./level; see text
description: Makes a rope move at your command.

name: Anonymous Interaction
target: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: Creatures forget details about you and conversations with you.

name: Ant Haul
description: Triples carrying capacity of a creature.

name: Ant Haul, Communal
description: As ant haul, but you may divide the duration among creatures touched.

name: Anthropomorphic Animal
components: V, S, M (a humanoid thumb bone)
description: Animal becomes bipedal.

name: Anti-Incorporeal Shell
description: Incorporeal creatures stay 10 ft. away from you.

name: Anticipate Peril
description: Target gains a bonus on one initiative check.

name: Antilife Shell
description: 10-ft.-radius field hedges out living creatures.

name: Antimagic Field
components: V, S, M/DF (pinch of powdered iron or iron filings)
description: Negates magic within 10 ft.

name: Antipathy
components: V, S, M/DF (a lump of alum soaked in vinegar)
target: one location (up to a 10-ft. cube/level) or one object
description: Object or location affected by spell repels certain creatures.

name: Antiplant Shell
description: Keeps animated plants at bay.

name: Antitech Field
description: You bring into being a mobile, hemispherical energy field that prevents technological objects, signals, and creatures from entering. An antitech field suppresses any technological effect used within, brought into, or deployed into the area, but does not negate it. Time spent within an antitech field counts against the suppressed effect's duration. Robots and other technological constructs that come in contact with an antitech field must attempt a Fortitude saving throw each round they remain in ...

name: Aqueous Orb
components: V, S, M (a drop of water and a glass bead)
description: Creates rolling sphere of water.

name: Arboreal Hammer
description: Tree branches attack opponents.

name: Arcana Theft
description: Targeted dispel transfers an effect to you.

name: Arcane Cannon
components: V, S, F (an ornate miniature cannon forged with a drop of your blood that costs 5,000 gp)
description: Your focus becomes a magical cannon that fires on its own.

name: Arcane Concordance
description: Grants metamagic to arcane spells.

name: Arcane Eye
components: V, S, M (a bit of bat fur)
description: Invisible floating eye moves 30 ft./round.

name: Arcane Lock
components: V, S, M (gold dust worth 25 gp)
target: door, chest, or portal touched, up to 30 sq. ft./level in size
description: Magically locks a portal or chest.

name: Arcane Mark
effect: one personal rune or mark, all of which must fit within 1 sq. ft.
description: Inscribes a personal rune on an object or creature (visible or invisible).

name: Arcane Sight
description: Magical auras become visible to you.

name: Arcane Sight, Greater
description: As arcane sight, but also reveals magic effects on creatures and objects.

name: Archon's Aura
description: Aura penalizes enemy attacks and AC.

name: Arrow Eruption
components: V, S, M (arrow or crossbow bolt)
description: Creates duplicates of killing arrow.

name: Arrow Of Law
description: Harm and possibly daze chaotic creatures.

name: Ascension
components: V, S, F (minor artifact), M (10,000 gp in rare herbs, gems, and other exotic materials)
description: You imbue a number of creatures with mythic power.

name: Ash Storm
components: V, S, M/DF (a pinch of ash)
description: Hamper vision and movement.

name: Aspect Of The Bear
description: +2 AC and combat maneuver rolls.

name: Aspect Of The Falcon
description: Gives bonuses on Perception and ranged attacks.

name: Aspect Of The Stag
description: +2 AC against attacks of opportunity and increases speed.

name: Aspect Of The Wolf

name: Astral Projection

name: Astral Projection, Lesser
target: you plus one additional willing creature touched per two caster levels
description: Limited astral travel.

name: Atavism
description: Animal gains advanced creature simple template.

name: Atavism, Mass
target: one animal/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart

name: Atonement
components: V, S, M (burning incense), F (a set of prayer beads or other prayer device worth at least 500 gp), DF
description: Removes burden of misdeeds from subject.

name: Augury
components: V, S, M (incense worth at least 25 gp), F (a set of marked sticks or bones worth at least 25 gp)
description: Learns whether an action will be good or bad.

name: Aura Of Doom
description: Creatures in your aura become shaken.

name: Aura Of Greater Courage
description: Increases strength of a paladin's aura of courage.

name: Aura Sight
description: Alignment auras become visible to you.

name: Aura of Cannibalism
components: V, S, M (a piece of flesh from another creature of your species)
description: You emanate an aura that saps the strength of others of your kind and channels their energy into you. Each round that a creature starts its turn in the spell's area and shares both your creature type and at least one subtype you possess (if any), that creature must succeed at a Fortitude save or take 1d4 points of damage. You gain a number of temporary hit points equal to the amount of damage you deal with this spell (maximum 10 + your caster level). These temporary hit points go away when the s...

name: Awaken
components: V, S, M (herbs and oils worth 2,000 gp), DF
description: Animal or tree gains human intellect.

name: Badger's Ferocity
description: Weapons are keen while you concentrate.

name: Baleful Polymorph
saving_throw: Fortitude negates, Will partial, see text
description: Turns subject into harmless animal.

name: Ball Lightning
components: V, S, M/DF (a small iron ring)
description: Flying balls of lightning deal 3d6 electricity damage each.

name: Bane
description: Enemies take -1 on attack rolls and saves vs. fear.

name: Banish Seeming
components: V, S, M (a cold iron nail)
description: Dispels touched illusion or a creature's change in form.

name: Banishment

description: Banishes 2 HD/level of extraplanar creatures.

name: Banshee Blast
saving_throw: Reflex half and Will negates (see text)
description: Cone deals 1d4 per level and panics creatures.

name: Bard's Escape
components: V, S, M (pieces of a smashed fiddle)
target: you and up to 1 willing creature/2 caster levels, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: You and allies escape an emergency by teleporting to safety.

name: Barkskin
description: Grants +2 (or higher) enhancement to natural armor.

name: Barrow Haze
effect: fog spreads in 20-ft. radius, 20 ft. high
description: Fog obscures the vision of others and extends the range of your hexes.

name: Battle Trance
description: You are transformed into a single-minded force of destruction.

name: Battlemind Link
range: personal and close (25 ft. + 5 ft./2 levels)
description: You and an ally gain attack and AC bonuses.

name: Bear's Endurance
components: V, S, M/DF (a few hairs, or a pinch of dung, from a bear)
description: Subject gains +4 to Con for 1 min./level.

name: Bear's Endurance, Mass
components: V, S, M/DF (a few hairs, or a pinch of dung, from a bear)
target: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: As bear's endurance, affects one subject/level.

name: Beast Shape I
components: V, S, M (a piece of the creature whose form you plan to assume)

name: Beast Shape II
components: V, S, M (a piece of the creature whose form you plan to assume)

name: Beast Shape III
components: V, S, M (a piece of the creature whose form you plan to assume)
description: You take the form of a Diminutive or Huge animal, or Small or Medium magical beast.

name: Beast Shape IV
components: V, S, M (a piece of the creature whose form you plan to assume)
description: You take the form of a Diminutive to Huge animal or a Tiny to Large magical beast.

name: Beastspeak
description: Speak normally while in animal form.

name: Beguiling Gift
components: V, S, F (the object to be offered)
description: Subject immediately accepts an offered item and uses it.

name: Bestow Auras

name: Bestow Curse
description: -6 to an ability score; -4 on attack rolls, saves, and checks; or 50% chance of losing each action.

name: Bestow Grace
description: Subject gains bonus on saving throws equal to Cha modifier.

name: Bestow Grace Of The Champion
description: Target gains paladin abilities for 1 round/level.

name: Bestow Insight
description: Target gains a +2 insight bonus on skill checks with a skill you have at least one rank in and is considered trained in that skill.

name: Bestow Weapon Proficiency
components: V, S, M (pieces of shaved metal)
description: Grants a creature proficiency in a single weapon for short period of time.

name: Binding

name: Binding Earth
target: one creature or unattended object (see text)
description: If the target of this spell fails its Fortitude save, areas of earth and stone floor act as a snapping quagmire that pulls the target down and damages it if it attempts to move through such terrain.

name: Binding Earth, Mass
target: one creature or object/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: This spell functions as binding earth, except as noted.

name: Black Mark
components: V, S, M (a flask of seawater)
description: You mark the target with a black marking on its skin; The mark functions as a mark of justice but with respect to water.

name: Black Tentacles
components: V, S, M (octopus or squid tentacle)
description: Tentacles grapple all creatures within a 20-ft. spread.

name: Blade Barrier
effect: wall of whirling blades up to 20 ft. long/level, or a ringed wall of whirling blades with a radius of up to 5 ft. per two levels; either form is 20 ft. high
saving_throw: Reflex half or Reflex negates; see text
description: Wall of blades deals 1d6/level damage.

name: Blade Lash
description: Use your weapon like a whip to trip an opponent.

name: Blade Of Bright Victory
description: Bonded weapon gains ghost touch.

name: Blade Of Dark Triumph
description: Bonded weapon gains ghost touch.

name: Blasphemy
area: nonevil creatures in a 40-ft.-radius spread centered on you
description: Kills, paralyzes, weakens, or dazes nonevil subjects.

name: Blaze Of Glory
casting_time: 1 standard action or immediate action; see text
description: Last stand cures good creatures, hurts evil.

name: Blazing Rainbow
components: V, S, M (a drop of rainwater)
description: Create bow with brilliant energy arrows or a bridge that helps allies and hinders opponents.

name: Bleed
description: Cause a stabilized creature to resume dying.

name: Bleed Glory
description: Increases costs of using mythic powers for target.

name: Blend
description: You draw upon your elven link to the wilderness to change the coloration of yourself and your equipment to match that of your surroundings.

name: Bless
area: The caster and all allies within a 50-ft. burst, centered on the caster
description: Allies gain +1 on attack rolls and saves against fear.

name: Bless Water
components: V, S, M (5 pounds of powdered silver worth 25 gp)
description: Makes holy water.

name: Bless Weapon
description: Weapon strikes true against evil foes.

name: Blessed Fist
description: Target doesn't provoke attacks of opportunity with unarmed strikes.

name: Blessing Of Courage And Life
description: Grants a +2 bonus on saves vs. fear and death.

name: Blessing Of Fervor
target: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: Gives allies a choice of benefits.

name: Blessing Of Luck And Resolve
description: A favored blessing of halfling clerics, this spell grants its target a +2 morale bonus on saving throws against fear effects.

name: Blessing Of Luck And Resolve, Mass
target: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: Functions like blessing of luck and resolve, except that it affects multiple creatures.

name: Blessing Of The Mole
description: 1 ally/level gains darkvision and a +2 Stealth bonus.

name: Blessing Of The Salamander
description: Subject gets fast healing 5, fire resistance 20, +2 CMD.

name: Blight
description: Withers one plant or deals 1d6/level damage to plant creature.

name: Blinding Ray
effect: one or more rays of light
description: You blast your enemies with blinding rays of sunlight.

name: Blindness/Deafness
description: Makes subject blind or deaf.

name: Blink
description: You randomly vanish and reappear for 1 round per level.

name: Blistering Invective
description: Make an Intimidate check against all foes within 30 feet; those demoralized also take fire damage.

name: Bloatbomb
saving_throw: Fortitude negates or Reflex half (see text)
description: Kill a weak creature and turn its corpse into an explosive trap.

name: Blood Armor
description: Your blood hardens when you are wounded, increasing your AC.

name: Blood Biography
components: V, S, M/DF (a scrap of parchment)
target: one creature's blood or one bloodstain
description: Learn about a creature with its blood.

name: Blood Blaze
description: The target gains a 5-foot-radius aura that causes the blood of creatures in that area to ignite upon contact with air.

name: Blood Crow Strike
description: Unarmed strikes create crows that deal fire and negative energy damage.

name: Blood Mist
components: V, S, M (a pinch of dried red algae)
description: Mist causes Wisdom damage and rage.

name: Blood Scent
target: one creature/2 levels, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: You greatly magnify the target's ability to smell the presence of blood.

name: Blood Sentinel
components: V, S, M (a life-sized animal sculpture of a familiar made of clay, cloth, stone, or wood, plus mandrake root worth 25 gp)
description: Animate an animal sculpture to be your temporary familiar.

name: Blood Transcription
description: Learn a spell from the target's blood.

name: Blood in the Water
description: As part of the casting of this spell, you must deal 1 point of piercing or slashing damage to yourself to release your blood. This causes you to take 1 point of bleed damage. While the spell is in effect, all sharks, feeders in the depths, and creatures with the blood frenzy ability in the area gain a +2 bonus to Strength and Constitution and take a –2 penalty to AC. This is treated as blood frenzy for the purposes of other feats and effects, and doesn't stack with the effects of actual blood fr...

name: Bloodhound
components: V, S, M (a drop of blood and a pinch of cinnamon)
description: Gives caster the scent special ability.

name: Bloody Claws
description: Gives creature the ability to deal bleed damage with natural attacks.

name: Blur
description: Attacks miss subject 20% of the time.

name: Blurred Movement
description: As blur, but only while you are moving.

name: Body Capacitance
description: Store electricity attacks used against you and release the energy as a touch attack.

name: Boiling Blood
target: one creature per three levels, no two of which may be more than 30 ft. apart
description: Targets take fire damage; orcs get +2 Strength.

name: Bomber's Eye
description: Increases thrown weapon range; +1 attack.

name: Borrow Fortune
description: Retry attack or check, but do worse on next two.

name: Borrow Skill
description: Make a skill check using another's ranks.

name: Bouncy Body
description: The target's flesh becomes flexible and rubbery. It gains a +2 circumstance bonus on grapple combat maneuver checks and Escape Artist checks, as well as to its CMD against combat maneuver checks to grapple. Anytime the target would take falling damage, it treats falls as 20 feet shorter (minimum 0) for the purpose of determining damage. In addition, if the target falls against a hard surface, it can attempt an Acrobatics check (DC = the distance fallen) to attempt to bounce upward; success means...

name: Bow Spirit
description: Summons an invisible spirit that fires your arrows for you as a swift action.

name: Bowstaff
description: A shortbow may double as a club, or a longbow as a quarterstaff.

name: Brand
description: Creates permanent brand on target creature.

name: Brand, Greater
description: As brand, but brand glows when near your holy symbol.

name: Break
description: Gives an object the broken condition.

name: Break Enchantment
target: up to one creature per level, all within 30 ft. of each other
description: Frees subjects from enchantments, transmutations, and curses.

name: Breath Of Life
saving_throw: Will negates (harmless) or Will half, see text
description: Cures 5d8 damage + 1/level and restores life to recently slain creatures.

name: Brilliant Inspiration
description: Take best of two d20 rolls.

name: Bristle
description: Trade natural armor bonus for a bonus on attacks with natural weapons.

name: Brow Gasher
description: Slashing weapon deals bleed damage to an opponent's head.

name: Bull's Strength
components: V, S, M/DF (a few hairs, or a pinch of dung, from a bull)
description: Subject gains +4 to Str for 1 min./level.

name: Bull's Strength, Mass
components: V, S, M/DF (a few hairs, or a pinch of dung, from a bull)
target: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: As bull's strength, affects 1 subject per level.

name: Bullet Shield

name: Bullet Ward
components: V, S, F (one to four adamantine bullets, each worth 61 gp)

name: Bungle
description: Target takes a -20 penalty on its next attack roll or check.

name: Buoyancy
target: one Medium or smaller object or creature/level, no two of which can be more than 20 ft. apart
description: Targets easily float on water.

name: Burning Gaze
components: V, S, M/DF (eye of a mundane salamander)
description: Inflict 1d6 fire damage to creature by looking at it.

name: Burning Hands
description: 1d4/level fire damage (max 5d4).

name: Burrow
description: Target gains a burrow speed of 15.

name: Burst Bonds
target: one object or creature restraining you
description: 1d6 damage/level (max 5d6) to restraints.

name: Burst Of Nettles
description: Burst deals 3d6 damage and 1d6 acid.

name: Burst Of Speed
description: You gain increased speed, and your movement ignores attacks of opportunity and allows you to move through the space of creatures larger than you are.

name: Cackling Skull
description: Skull acts as magic mouth, listeners are shaken.

name: Cacophonous Call
components: V, S, M (a scrap of sheet music)

name: Cacophonous Call, Mass
components: V, S, M (a scrap of sheet music)
target: one creature/level (all of which must be within 30 feet)

name: Caging Bomb Admixture

name: Calcific Touch
target: creature or creatures touched (up to one per level)

name: Call Animal

name: Call Construct

name: Call Lightning

name: Call Lightning Storm
description: As call lightning, but 5d6 damage per bolt.

name: Calm Animals

name: Calm Emotions
description: Calms creatures, negating emotion effects.

name: Campfire Wall
components: V, S, M/DF (ash made from burnt thorns)
description: Creates a shelter around a campfire.

name: Cape Of Wasps
description: Wasp swarm defends or carries you.

name: Cast Out
description: Does 2d8 damage +1/level (max +15) to creature and dispels an effect.

name: Castigate
description: Causes target to be shaken and cower.

name: Castigate, Mass
target: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: As castigate, but affects multiple creatures.

name: Cat's Grace
components: V, S, M (pinch of cat fur)
description: Subject gains +4 to Dex for 1 min./level.

name: Cat's Grace, Mass
components: V, S, M (pinch of cat fur)
target: one creature/level, no two of which can be more than 30 ft. apart
description: As cat's grace, affects 1 subject/level.

name: Cause Fear

name: Caustic Eruption

The target takes 12d6 points of damage + 1 point per caster level, or 3d6 points of damage + 1 point per caster level on a successful saving throw. A cyborg or android can be damaged by this spell, but takes half damage and gains a +4 bonus on the saving throw to resist the spell's effects.

You see radioactive auras as a glowing green shimmer in the air that emanates from radioactive objects; the brighter and more intense the green, the more powerful the radioactivity. This glow does not provide illumination or allow you to see in darkness, apart from being able to see the glow itself. The spell can penetrate barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks it—although radiati...

This destruction also occurs if the creature attempts to study the item in order to learn its properties or how to magically craft it (a miracle or wis...

Creatures casting spells such as detect undead must succeed at a saving throw (with a DC equal to the spell's save DC) to detect the target's presence, and if the target is intelligent, it gains a +10 bonus on Disguise checks to appear alive or recently deceased. If the undead has any features different from those o...

It loses the robot subtype, but does not lose its Intelligence score (if any). It can perform any tasks an unseen servant can, plus any similar tasks its Strength allows (it's able to lift up to 50 pounds), but instead of walking on water, it gains a swim speed of 30 feet. You can command a mud buddy to move up to 5 feet and trip an opponent (CMB = your caster level + your spellcasting ability score modifier). After the trip attempt ...

First, the target gains a +2 deflection bonus to AC and a +2 resistance bonus on saving throws. If you restore more charges than the item can hold, the item must succeed at a Fortitude saving throw or take 1d6 points of electricity damage for each excess charge. This spell provides no knowledge of how many charges an item can safely hold, but you can choo...

description: You remove all ongoing radiation effects, both primary and secondary, on a single target if you succeed at a caster level check (DC = the Fortitude DC associated with the radiation effect). In addition, you immediately restore 1d4 points of Constitution drain and 1d4 points of Strength drain caused by radiation—this spell cannot restore ability damage or drain caused by other sources. When cast on an area, a single casting of remove radioactivity removes radiation from a 20-foot-radius area arou...

name: Remove Radioactivity, Greater
description: This spell functions like remove radioactivity, save that it cures all ability damage and drain due to radioactivity that the target has taken. In addition, you can deplete a radioactive object as well, although because you must touch the object to affect it, you expose yourself to at least 1 round of contact with the object's radiation. You must succeed at a caster level check (DC = 5 + the Fortitude DC associated with the radiation effect) in order to deplete the object. If you are successful,...

name: Remove Sickness

name: Restoration

If the target prepares spells, it must choose one of its prepared 3rd-level spells, which is immediately lost. If the target has no 3rd-level spells prepared, it loses a 2nd-level spell it has prepared. This progresses down to a 1st-level spell if the target has no 2nd-level spells prepared, and this spell has no effect if the target also has no 1st-level spells prepar...

name: Urban Step
description: Step into one doorway and out another.

name: Urgathoa's Beacon
description: Cause creatures to attract the attention of undead

name: Vacuous Vessel
description: Make a single container appear empty.

name: Vampiric Hunger
description: Grant a target the fangs and hunger of a vampire.

name: Vampiric TouchY
description: Touch deals 1d6 damage per two levels; caster gains damage as temporary hp.

name: Veil of Ash
description: Conjure a small cloud of burning ash in the target's face.

name: Veil of HeavenR
description: Surround yourself with protection against evil outsiders.

name: Vengeful Comets
description: Create a group of orbiting comets that can immediately strike those who target you with spells.

name: Vengeful StingerR
description: Grow a long, wasp-like tail with stinger.

name: Venomous BiteM
description: Enhance a target creature’s bite with poison.

name: Venomous Promise
description: Entwine your words with poison, harming the target if they share your message.

name: Vermicious Assumption
description: Call upon a vermlek demon to invade and inhabit the body of a nearby corpse.

name: Vermin Shape IY
description: Take the form and some of the powers of a Small or Medium vermin.

name: Vermin Shape IIY
description: As vermin shape, but Tiny or Large.

name: Verminous Transformation
description: Partially transform into a swarm.

name: Vex Giant
description: Gain increased senses against a target larger than you.

name: Vexing Miscalculation
description: Prevent the target from scoring critical hits.

name: Vicarious View
description: Plant a scrying sensor that you can use to spy on a creature, object, or location.

name: Vigilant Rest
description: Cause a sleeping creature to retain some perception of its surroundings

name: Vigor
description: Give someone a +1 bonus on their next melee damage roll.

name: Vile Dog Transformation
description: Transform ordinary dogs into fiendish minions.

name: Village VeilR
description: Make an area seem worthless to others.

name: Vine Strike
description: Enhance one of your natural or unarmed attacks with thorny vine growth

name: Vinetrap
description: Constrict the subject with choking vines.

name: Violent Accident
description: Curse a target to have a lethal accident in the near future

name: Violent Misfire
description: Cause a firearm to misfire and explode

name: Violent Misfire, Greater
description: As per violent misfire, but 1 target/level

name: Virulence
description: Quickly advance the spread of diseases within the targeted creatures.

name: Virulent Miasma
description: As fog cloud, but vapor is diseased

name: VisionMF
description: As legend lore, but quicker.

name: Vision of Lamashtu
description: As nightmare, but can deliver a second spell when the target awakens.

name: Visualization of the BodyM
description: Gain a +5 bonus on checks with one physical ability score for 24 hours, discharge for a one-time physical boost

name: Visualization of the MindM
description: Gain a +5 bonus on checks with one mental ability score for 24 hours, discharge for a one-time mental boost

name: Voluminous Vocabulary
description: Grant ability to speak, read, and write one or more languages for 8 hours.

name: Vomit TwinRY
description: Vomit an ooze copy of yourself that you can swap places with.

name: WaftR
description: Alter the targets so they are light enough to be carried by the wind.

name: Walk the Plank
description: As create pit, but filled with water and contains sharks

name: Walk through SpaceY
description: You can spend a move action to teleport 30 feet or to stand while prone without provoking attacks of opportunity.

name: Wall of Bone
description: Create a wall of bones that damages and grapples adjacent creatures

name: Wall of BrineR
description: Conjure a 5-foot-thick wall of seawater with a powerful current.

name: Wall of Clockwork
description: Create a wall made up of spinning cogs and gears.

name: Wall of Ectoplasm
description: Wall of spirits blocks movement on Material Plane and Ethereal Plane and causes fear.

name: Wall of FireY
description: Deals 2d4 fire damage out to 10 ft. and 1d4 out to 20 ft. Passing through wall deals 2d6 damage +1/level.

name: Wall of ForceY
description: Wall is immune to damage.

name: Wall of IceY
description: Ice plane creates wall or hemisphere creates dome.

name: Wall of IronMY
description: 30 hp/four levels; can topple onto foes.

name: Wall of Light
description: Create a wall of blinding light.

name: Wall of Mist
description: Create a wall of mist that creates concealment

name: Wall of Silver
description: Wall of energy that only blocks and affects evil creatures and spells

name: Wall of Split Illumination
description: Create a wall of illumination, darkness on one side, light on the other.

name: Wall of StoneY
description: Creates a stone wall that can be shaped.

name: Wall of SuppressionM
description: Creates wall that disables magic.

name: Wall of ThornsY
description: Thorns damage anyone who tries to pass.

name: Wandering Trail
description: Warp a creatures trail through the area.

name: Wandering Weather
description: Control weather in a large area that moves with you

name: Ward of the SeasonR
description: Enhance a creature with the power of a season.

name: Ward Shield
description: Enchant a shield with Spell Resistance and a bonus against area-effect spells.

name: Warp Metal
description: Warp wood, affecting metal objects

name: Watchful Animal
description: Place a scrying sensor on your animal companion or familiar.

name: Watchful EyeFRT
description: As shield other, but with a shorter duration and the requirement that you must maintain line of effect with whom you are linked to.

name: Water Shield
description: Surround yourself with a protective spout of acid.

name: Waterproof
description: Target becomes waterproof for the spells duration

name: Waters of LamashtuMY
description: Create a poison which looks like clean and pure water.

name: Wave Form
description: Briefly turn into a huge wave that knocks down everything in your path

name: Waves of Blood
description: A cone of blood pushes creatures, sickens them, and makes the ground slick.

name: Weapons Against EvilR
description: Enhance weapons with pale light that allow them to bypass minor DR of evil creatures.

name: Weaponwand
description: Merge a wand with your weapon, allowing you to wield the wand at the same time you use your weapon.

name: WebY
description: Fills 20-ft.-radius spread with sticky spiderwebs that can grapple foes and impair movement.

name: Web BoltR
description: Throw a fist-sized ball of webbing at a target to ensare them.

name: Web CloudR
description: Create a cloud-like spread of flame-resistant webbing.

name: What Grows WithinR
description: Infect others with Xhamen-Dor’s seeded infestation.

name: WhirlwindY
description: Cyclone deals damage and can pick up creatures.

name: Whispering LoreR
description: Gain a bonus to Knowledge based on the terrain you are in.

name: Wicker Horse
description: Create a mount out of the surrounding flora

name: Wild Instinct
description: Sharpen your senses, gain a bonus to Perception even while asleep.

name: Wind BladesR
description: Harden the air around the target into jagged invisible blades.

name: Windy EscapeR
description: Briefly become insubstantial, allowing an attack to pass harmlessly through you.

name: Wing BountyR
description: Sprout berries from your wings, enhanced as if by goodberry.

name: Wing ThornsR
description: Sprout poisonous thorns from your wings.

name: Winged Sword
description: Grant a weapon the throwing special ability.

name: Winter FeathersR
description: Protect a feathered creature from the cold for a day.

name: Winter Grasp
description: Create a slippery sheet of ice on the ground

name: WishMY
description: As limited wish, but with fewer limits.

name: With the Wind
description: Protect a target from being blown away by wind of less than windstorm force

name: Withdraw Affliction
description: Remove an affliction and inflict it on another creature.

name: Wither Limb
description: Make one of the creature's limbs useless.

name: Wizened Appearance
description: Make a target appear as an older version of itself.

name: Wooden Wing ShieldR
description: Transmute your wings into a wooden shield-like barrier.

name: Woodland Rune
description: Triggered rune slows the movements of creatures in the area

name: Word of Beckoning
description: As sending, but the target gets the ability to teleport to your side if they desire

name: Word of ChaosY
description: Kills, confuses, stuns, or deafens nonchaotic subjects.

name: Wracking Ray
description: Fire a ray to deal Dexterity and Strength damage.

name: Wrathful Weapon
description: Enhance a weapon with the anarchic, axiomatic, holy, or unholy special ability.

name: Wreath of BladesF
description: Four mithral daggers speed around you, attacking nearby creatures and protecting your spellcasting from attacks of opportunity.

name: Yellow SignMR
description: Use this symbol to subject all who view it to the will of Hastur.

name: Zephyr's FleetnessR
description: +30 foot land and fly speed (if any) to your allies.

name: Zone of Foul Flames
description: Create an area that returns fire spells and effects back onto their caster.
